name: marketing-skills
description: A comprehensive suite of marketing skills for content strategy, SEO, email campaigns, social media, and analytics.
author: coreyhaines31

content-strategy.name: Content Strategy
content-strategy.description: Plan and develop content strategies aligned with business goals, target audiences, and brand voice.

seo-optimization.name: SEO Optimization
seo-optimization.description: Optimize content for search engines with keyword research, on-page SEO, and technical recommendations.

email-campaigns.name: Email Campaigns
email-campaigns.description: Design and optimize email marketing campaigns with subject lines, templates, and A/B testing strategies.

social-media.name: Social Media
social-media.description: Create and manage social media content across platforms with scheduling and engagement strategies.

analytics-reporting.name: Analytics & Reporting
analytics-reporting.description: Analyze marketing performance data and generate actionable reports and dashboards.
